name: Yorkshire Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs and salt slightly with a fork.
2. Gradually add the flour to the eggs, beating constantly.
3. Slowly add milk until the mixture is smooth.
4. Add more milk to achieve a batter consistency similar to thin pancake batter.
5. Allow the batter to stand for 1 hour.
6. Heat 2 tablespoons of beef fat in a baking pan in an oven preheated to 425°F (220°C).
7. Pour the batter onto the hot fat.
8. Bake for 20 minutes at 425°F (220°C).
